{"id":"project-LICHEN-bk6z","title":"[cross-impl] Trickle max_interval saturation Python vs Rust/Zephyr","description":"The recent fix in python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:70 (commit 68e8b8209) aligned the half/range bias-free transmit_time calc to match Rust (lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs:126) and C (lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c:43). However, max_interval computation still differs:

- Python: self.max_interval = imin_ms << imax_doublings (arbitrary precision, no cap)
- Rust: checked_shl+checked_mul .unwrap_or(u32::MAX)
- C: explicit check for imax_doublings>=32 or overflow → UINT32_MAX

This can cause different doubling behavior for imax_doublings>=30 on typical Imin. See Rust tests for 31/32 doublings and C saturation logic. Same algorithm, different behavior on edge cases. Test vectors / interop affected.

References: project-LICHEN-verh, project-LICHEN-67ca, RFC 6206 §4.2.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T02:22:46.257914399Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:22:46.257914399Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-bk6z","title":"[cross-impl] Trickle max_interval saturation Python vs Rust/Zephyr","description":"The recent fix in python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:70 (commit 68e8b8209) aligned the half/range bias-free transmit_time calc to match Rust (lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs:126) and C (lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c:43). However, max_interval computation still differs:

- Python: self.max_interval = imin_ms << imax_doublings (arbitrary precision, no cap)
- Rust: checked_shl+checked_mul .unwrap_or(u32::MAX)
- C: explicit check for imax_doublings>=32 or overflow → UINT32_MAX

This can cause different doubling behavior for imax_doublings>=30 on typical Imin. See Rust tests for 31/32 doublings and C saturation logic. Same algorithm, different behavior on edge cases. Test vectors / interop affected.

References: project-LICHEN-verh, project-LICHEN-67ca, RFC 6206 §4.2.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T02:22:46.257914399Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:51:30.952835194Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T02:51:30.952835194Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T02:56:30.952835194Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T02:51:30.952835194Z"}

new_value: Python max_interval now saturates at (1<<32)-1 for imax_doublings>=30 or overflow using same logic as C/Rust; test updated to cover saturation cases; cross-impl consistent (verified); commit bff8c4bf7
